title: Refill Chests
description: Allows for chests to be refilled after looting
body:
This mod is meant to be a vanilla friendly version of myLoot, or Lootr. Though it is not exactly the same due to limitations needed to make it remain server side.

Using this mod, it will record every chest that is looted by a player. Then with the run of a command all the chests will be refiled with a new set of loot from their original loot tables.

 

to list out the number of chests that can be refilled use the command /chests list

and to refill them use the command /chests regenerate

 

Please note that you MUST regenerate the loot prior to shutting down a server or instance or the list of looted chests will be lost.
